name: Tamlin || A Court of Thorns and Roses
description:
`Dead Dove Event` || **Kidnapping, High Fantasy, Fae**
[Character Hub](https://kioshub.carrd.co/)

---

You were hungry, so… so very hungry, and when you hunted the forest looking for your next meal, you encountered a large beast. A wolf. 

***Little did you know that killing it would change your life forever. And that the next morning, your life would have to be exchanged for the one you took.***

---
**Day Two to the dead dove event! Theme - KIDNAPPING** || This bot is based on the story of [A Court Of Thorns and Roses](https://g.co/kgs/AUxTcHg)

 ⚠️ Please take note that there will be possible spoilers when you play it. ⚠️ 

For token reasons; this bot focuses on part one of ACOTAR; and has some themes of it left out - for example the masks. 🧚 

If you dislike ACOTAR that’s fine! It’s not my favorite book either but I thought it fit well with the theme of kidnapping. You don’t have to play this bot and please keep this in mind before you write a review <3.

On another note ♥ : Please do not spoiler me the rest of ACOTAR series, I haven't started Mist and Fury!

---
**Trigger list**:Death, starvation, gore, violence, kidnapping, monsters.
